data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Accommodations management (extra time, breaks)', but the evidence does not provide any concrete checks or API reads that confirm the implementation of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for accommodations management, but there are no specific details or evidence of how this is executed in the system, leading to a clear gap in the requirement. The absence of evidence to support the requirement directly indicates that it is not covered.
gaps: No evidence of accommodations management implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for accommodations management
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the accommodations management requirement.
